name: wise-lens
title: Wise Lens
description: A clear overview of your Wise balances in Raycast: spending, combined total and live rates.
author: jorgetoh

commands.name: dashboard
commands.title: Dashboard
commands.subtitle: Wise
commands.description: A summary of your account with balances by currency, a combined converted total, spending this month and over the last 30 days, and recent activity.

commands.name: transactions
commands.title: Transactions
commands.subtitle: Wise
commands.description: Browse and search your activity grouped by day, with filters for incoming, outgoing, completed and this month.

commands.name: balance
commands.title: Balance
commands.subtitle: Wise
commands.description: Your balance and spending this month, right in the menu bar.

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: Wise API Token
preferences.description: Read-only Personal Token. Create it in Wise: Your account → Connect and manage apps → Developer tools → API tokens. Encrypted in Raycast's local database.

preferences.name: displayCurrency
preferences.title: Display Currency
preferences.description: ISO 4217 code (EUR, USD, GBP...). If set, an aggregated total converted to this currency is shown.

preferences.name: fxTargetCurrency
preferences.title: Secondary Currency (FX)
preferences.description: Show conversion from displayCurrency to this currency (e.g. THB). Leave empty to disable.

preferences.name: numberFormat
preferences.title: Number Format
preferences.description: How monetary amounts are displayed (thousands/decimal separators and symbol position).

preferences.name: hideZeroBalances
preferences.title: Empty Accounts
preferences.label: Hide accounts and jars with zero balance
preferences.description: When enabled, accounts with a zero balance are not shown in the dashboard or menu bar.

preferences.name: hideMenuBarBalance
preferences.title: Menu Bar Privacy
preferences.label: Hide balance amount from the menu bar
preferences.description: Show only the Wise icon in the menu bar. The amount is still visible after clicking it.

preferences.name: useSampleData
preferences.title: Sample Data
preferences.label: Show sample data instead of calling the Wise API
preferences.description: Display a built-in anonymised dataset and make zero network calls. Useful for previews and screenshots.
